assets.name: lecture_02_figure_02.png
assets.rationale: This frame gives the clearest and most complete view of the board with the least occlusion. The top flat-space spherical line element, the Schwarzschild correction with the ‘1-2MG/(c^2 r)’ factor, the shorthand ‘1-R_s/r,’ and the right-hand radial sketch are all visible together, making it the most useful frame for both equation transcription and a cautious redraw.
assets.subtitle_excerpt: This is the metric of a Schwarzschild black hole.
